languages.text: {n}Капитан рассказывает воодушевленно, страстно, с придыханием. Вы же невольно останавливаетесь взглядом на ее кожаном подсумке, на котором проглядывается примитивная татуировка. {/n} "Похоронные взвода — настоящие гении, Лорд-капитан. Я тоже из такого происхожу, хотя теперь уже снабженец. Мы чтим наших мертвых через принесение их тел в жертву остальному полку. Каждый готов отдать не только жизнь, но и свое тело после смерти, чтобы остальные выжили".

{n}The captain speaks with fervour, passion, a breathless intensity. Your eye, however, is involuntarily drawn to her leather satchel, upon which a crude tattoo is visible.{/n} "The funereal detachments are true geniuses, Lord Captain. I come from one myself, though now I serve as quartermaster. We honour our dead by sacrificing their bodies to the rest of the regiment. Every man and woman is prepared to give not only their life but their flesh after death, so that others might endure."
languages.original_text: {n}Капитан рассказывает воодушевленно, страстно, с придыханием. languages.text: {n}上尉讲得热血沸腾，充满激情，那份狂热令人窒息。然而，你的目光却不由自主地被她那只皮革挎包吸引过去，上面能瞧见一个粗糙的纹身。{/n}“殡葬分队的人都是天才，舰长大人。我自己就出身那里，不过现在当了军需官。我们将遗体献给军团里的同胞，以此向死者致敬。无论男女，每个人都已做好准备献出自己的生命，还有死后的血肉，只为让其他人能够撑下去。”
languages.original_text: {n}The captain speaks with fervour, passion, a breathless intensity. Your eye, however, is involuntarily drawn to her leather satchel, upon which a crude tattoo is visible.{/n} "The funereal detachments are true geniuses, Lord Captain. I come from one myself, though now I serve as quartermaster. We honour our dead by sacrificing their bodies to the rest of the regiment. Every man and woman is prepared to give not only their life but their flesh after death, so that others might endure."

languages.text: {n}Yüzbaşı şevkle, tutkuyla, nefes nefese bir yoğunlukla konuşuyor. Ancak gözün, istemsizce üzerinde kaba bir dövme bulunan deri çantasına kayıyor.{/n} "Cenaze müfrezeleri gerçek dâhilerdir Lord Kaptan. Ben de onlardan birindeydim, gerçi şimdi levazım subayı olarak görev yapıyorum. Ölülerimizi bedenlerini alayın geri kalanına feda ederek onurlandırıyoruz. Her erkek ve kadın; başkalarının dayanabilmesi için ölümden sonra sadece hayatlarını değil, etlerini de vermeye hazırdır."
languages.original_text: {n}The captain speaks with fervour, passion, a breathless intensity. Your eye, however, is involuntarily drawn to her leather satchel, upon which a crude tattoo is visible.{/n} "The funereal detachments are true geniuses, Lord Captain. I come from one myself, though now I serve as quartermaster. We honour our dead by sacrificing their bodies to the rest of the regiment. Every man and woman is prepared to give not only their life but their flesh after death, so that others might endure."

Ancak gözün, istemsizce üzerinde kaba bir dövme bulunan deri çantasına kayıyor.{/n} "Cenaze müfrezeleri gerçek dâhilerdir Lord Kaptan. Ben de onlardan birindeydim, gerçi şimdi levazım subayı olarak görev yapıyorum. Ölülerimizi bedenlerini alayın geri kalanına feda ederek onurlandırıyoruz. Her erkek ve kadın; başkalarının dayanabilmesi için ölümden sonra sadece hayatlarını değil, etlerini de vermeye hazırdır."

languages.text: {n}La capitaine débite son monologue passionné avec une telle intensité qu'elle en est presque essoufflée. Cependant, votre regard est involontairement attiré par sa sacoche de cuir, sur laquelle on distingue un tatouage rudimentaire.{/n} « Les détachements funéraires sont de véritables génies, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. J'en faisais partie, avant de devenir quartier-maître. Nous honorons les morts en sacrifiant leurs cadavres pour le bien du régiment. Nous sommes tous prêts à donner notre vie puis notre chair après la mort pour permettre aux autres de survivre. »
languages.original_text: {n}The captain speaks with fervour, passion, a breathless intensity. Your eye, however, is involuntarily drawn to her leather satchel, upon which a crude tattoo is visible.{/n} "The funereal detachments are true geniuses, Lord Captain. I come from one myself, though now I serve as quartermaster. We honour our dead by sacrificing their bodies to the rest of the regiment. Every man and woman is prepared to give not only their life but their flesh after death, so that others might endure."

Cependant, votre regard est involontairement attiré par sa sacoche de cuir, sur laquelle on distingue un tatouage rudimentaire.{/n} « Les détachements funéraires sont de véritables génies, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. J'en faisais partie, avant de devenir quartier-maître. Nous honorons les morts en sacrifiant leurs cadavres pour le bien du régiment. Nous sommes tous prêts à donner notre vie puis notre chair après la mort pour permettre aux autres de survivre. »

languages.text: {n}La capitana habla con fervor, pasión y una intensidad que le quita el aliento. Sin embargo, tu mirada se ve atraída por su bolsa de cuero, que muestra un tatuaje rudimentario.{/n} «Los destacamentos fúnebres cuentan con auténticos genios, Lord Capitán. Yo misma vengo de uno de ellos, aunque ejerza de intendente. Honramos a nuestros muertos sacrificando sus cuerpos por el bien del resto del regimiento. Cada uno de sus integrantes da, además de la vida, su carne póstuma para que los demás podamos resistir y seguir».
languages.original_text: {n}The captain speaks with fervour, passion, a breathless intensity. Your eye, however, is involuntarily drawn to her leather satchel, upon which a crude tattoo is visible.{/n} "The funereal detachments are true geniuses, Lord Captain. I come from one myself, though now I serve as quartermaster. We honour our dead by sacrificing their bodies to the rest of the regiment. Every man and woman is prepared to give not only their life but their flesh after death, so that others might endure."

Sin embargo, tu mirada se ve atraída por su bolsa de cuero, que muestra un tatuaje rudimentario.{/n} «Los destacamentos fúnebres cuentan con auténticos genios, Lord Capitán. Yo misma vengo de uno de ellos, aunque ejerza de intendente. Honramos a nuestros muertos sacrificando sus cuerpos por el bien del resto del regimiento. Cada uno de sus integrantes da, además de la vida, su carne póstuma para que los demás podamos resistir y seguir».

languages.text: {n}Dunawski spricht mit Inbrunst, Leidenschaft und einer atemlosen Intensität. Dein Blick fällt allerdings unfreiwillig auf ihren mit einem primitiven Symbol versehenen Ledertornister.{/n} "Die Bestattungsabteilungen sind wahre Genies, Lord Captain. Ich habe selbst in einem gedient, obwohl ich mittlerweile Quartiermeisterin bin. Wir ehren unsere Toten, indem wir ihre Körper dem Regiment opfern. Alle Männer und Frauen sind bereit, nicht nur ihr Leben, sondern nach dem Tod auch ihr Fleisch zu geben, damit andere überleben."
languages.original_text: {n}The captain speaks with fervour, passion, a breathless intensity. Every man and woman is prepared to give not only their life but their flesh after death, so that others might endure."

languages.text: {n}艦長は熱意と情熱を込めて、息を呑むような激しさで語ります。しかし、彼女の革製の鞄に目を奪われてしまうのです。そこには粗末なタトゥーが描かれています。{/n}「葬送隊は真の天才です。私はその出身ですが、今は軍需官として働いています。我々は死者を犠牲にして、生き残る者たちを救うのです。死後も、肉体まで捧げ、生き残る者たちが生き延びるために。」

Every man and woman is prepared to give not only their life but their flesh after death, so that others might endure."
